title: 151 Products Sticker Remover, White, 10 x 10 x 10 cm
features: REMOVE ANNOYING RESIDUE: 151 Sticker Remover Kit, quickly and easily removes stickers and residue from most retail item purchases, remove stickers from kitchen utensils, pan bases, glass & painted wood.
CLEAN HARD SURFACES: 151 Sticker Remover Kit, removes sticky residue left by stickers, tape, gum and price tags from hard surfaces inlcuding paint, wood, glass and kitchen utensils.
REMOVE DIFFICULT LABELS: 151 Sticker Remover Kit, aids removal of high tack stickers applied to hard products, glass, metal, pottery and china. Use to remove for own or gift purchase.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Includes a ready to use solution and hand held scraper. Store at room temperature
description: Product Description 151 Sticker Remover Kit, quickly and easily removes stickers and residue from most retail item purchases, remove stickers from kitchen utensils, pan bases, glass & painted wood. Removes sticky residue left by tape, gum and price tags from hard surfaces quickly and easily. Includes a ready to use solution and hand held scraper. Store at room temperature Box Contains sticker remover
